# Abstract Machines Hardware

Abstract Machines Hardware builds open-source, modular IoT gateways for smart metering, industrial automation, and edge computing.

## Products
- /docs/s0-gateway — S0 IoT Gateway (ESP32-C6, Wireless M-Bus, NB-IoT, LTE-M, Zephyr RTOS)
- /docs/s1-gateway — S1 IoT Gateway (Linux-based, BeagleV-Fire, industrial IoT)
- /docs/base-board — S0 Base Board (W5500 Ethernet, M-Bus transceiver, SD logging)

## Documentation
- /docs — Full documentation index
- /docs/s0-gateway/getting-started — Getting started guide
- /docs/s0-gateway/architecture — Hardware architecture

## About
https://absmach.eu
